subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ1.21
question_html:
Where does oxidation occur in a voltaic cell?

A. positive electrode and anode

B. negative electrode and anode

C. positive electrode and cathode

D. negative electrode and cathode
examiners_html: One G2 form thought the question was awkwardly worded, implying oxidation is occurring in two places rather than one. This question also had a relatively high discriminatory index.
